title: LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN comment references frame.c but no BUILD_ASSERT validates it
description:
Location: lichen_l2.c:82-92

**What goes wrong:** The comment says "This matches lichen_frame_parse() in frame.c which rejects frames < 9 bytes", but there's no compile-time or runtime assertion linking these two constants. If frame.c changes its minimum, lichen_l2.c will silently accept frames that frame.c rejects, or vice versa.

**Impact:** Frame parsing fails deep in lichen_link_rx() with a generic error instead of being caught early with a descriptive log at line 588.

**Fix:** Add a BUILD_ASSERT that LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN equals the constant from frame.c, or import the constant from a shared header.
